title: NGE Sega Saturn games
wikitext:
[]: NGE Sega Saturn games             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Apr 13, 2008 7:06 pm Stumbled across a few videos on nico that showed cutscenes from the Sega Saturn NGE games. I haven't seen a lot of this before so I figured it was worth making a thread about - while there are bits and bobs from Second Impression floating around online I've never seen any video from the first Saturn game To save folks the hassle of signing up on nico when they don't want to I've put them both in a MegaUpload folder here - http://www.megaupload.com/?d=CT9B47HK - or you can watch them here: video 1 , video 2 . The first video features the first unnamed Angel that's on this page - http://evageeks.org/FGP/Extracanonical_Mecha#Angels - there's loads of new animation even if it isn't great in both of these videos. The Angel fires lasers out of it's shoulders and can duplicate itself. The second video features the second unnamed Angel on the same page linked to above along with lots of nice animation of Shinji and his classmates messing around in school. Both videos are around 20 to 30 minutes long. You will need flvplayer or some equivalent to watch them.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Sun Apr 13, 2008 8:34 pm This is relevant to my intrests, thank you very much! I'm guessing no subtitles. Well, there's bound to be a translation guide somewhere. EDIT: Okay, no translation guide. My thoughts. The 1st video has laughably bad production values. It's like episode 25! Since Shinji seems to lose his memory, it might as well be. Also, it's only one path. The 2nd Impression video is incomplete. Not only is the megaupload download not giving me a full movie, but apparently this is an "Asuka" path. There are apparently multiple paths in this game...and the only way someone could see those paths is if someone managed to replay every single cutscene. Darn it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 20, 2008 9:21 pm Some of the paths from 2nd Impression (Asuka, Mayumi) for the first "episode/chapter" of the game are up on Youtube. If you really can't find it, then I'll provide the link to the user's site sometime next weekend or something. I'll give my thoughts on this once I watch it.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Mon Apr 21, 2008 12:24 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Some of the paths from 2nd Impression (Asuka, Mayumi) for the first "episode/chapter" of the game are up on Youtube. If you really can't find it, then I'll provide the link to the user's site sometime next weekend or something. I'll give my thoughts on this once I watch it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 21, 2008 4:12 pm Some things I noticed from watching Second Impression 1: ~An S2 Works battle piece playing! (This also occurs in Second Impression, though a different un-used S2 works piece is used.) ~Rei calling her "Ikari-kun" as "Shinji-kun"(!!) ~Similar vein, Asuka refers to Rei by her first name. (I've noticed in other games, namely GoS1 and the Ayanami with Asuka Raising Project game, Rei refers to Asuka by her first name.) ~Shinji calling Asuka "Asuka-san" and Rei "Ayanami-san": ~Yet another S2 Works piece! ~Asuka, to the confused Shinji: "But what a shock! Does this mean you've forgotten our kiss?" Shinji: "?! That can't be! I'm only 14 years old!" Asuka: " laughs " Shinji: "Does this make me an Ecchi-sukebe ?" ~Apparently this game-Angel took part of Shinji's memories, and destroying it is the way for him to remember who he is. ~The whole game(?) of 1st Impression is just that 20 minute clip?! Wow I really hope not. I mean, the fact we get "Owari" in Kanji after Misato welcomes Shinji back (lol him not remembering his recent memories before regaining his older ones) seems to imply this, but... Even though it's done in the style of EoTV 25/26 (or maybe more like episode 14?) I don't mind that at all, heh. Adds to the game's charm/cheesiness I think. Second Impression thoughts: ~Slightly different path from what was up on Youtube, though it still followed the Asuka version overall. ~This video also had a problem with suddenly stopping.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Mon Apr 21, 2008 8:10 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ~The whole game(?) of 1st Impression is just that 20 minute clip?! Wow I really hope not. I mean, the fact we get "Owari" in Kanji after Misato welcomes Shinji back (lol him not remembering his recent memories before regaining his older ones) seems to imply this, but... .

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Apr 21, 2008 11:33 pm As for the first Sega game, I have a DVD that Gainax put out that contains all the animation sequences that were in the game. This clip Zuggy posted is only a tiny portion of the whole. As mentioned above, Shinji has amnesia, and generally makes a complete ass of himself throughout the whole thing. It has a few LOL moments, such as when Shinji, having somehow gotten the idea that both Asuka and Hikari have the hots for him... ...addresses the two as "Baby-tachi"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 22, 2008 12:35 pm Tiny portion of the whole, eh? Glad to hear that. And...ba...baby-tachi?! (Asuka would promptly beat him up from anger/embarrassment, while Touji & Hikari Do Not Approve.) That's it, I've somehow got to get my hands on this whole game* just for that bit! Shin-seiki, what's the DVD called? Is it this thing http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KIBA-1013 (Looks like it's from both Sega Impression games.), or something else? Anyway, I've also heard the battle feature is poorly implemented, and that 2nd Impression makes up for that some how. *Based on the few Eva games I've played (GoS1 and 2, Ayanami with Asuka Raising Project, Evangelion2, some of Eva64) , I can safely say Evangelions (Evangelion 2) is the best, but it doesn't mean I don't enjoy the cheesiness of the other Eva games.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Apr 22, 2008 3:21 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And...ba...baby-tachi?!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 22, 2008 4:39 pm Baby=similar to babe in regards to being slang when referring to womens. This could be thought of as offensive or rude, depending on the person's POV. -tachi=Japanese plural indicator since you don't plurals in Japanese. For example, whether you're talking about 1 volume of manga or 5 depends on the context of the sentence. Basically, this all boils down to the fact that Shinji the Prude is making an ass of himself without realizing it (and only to forget doing so as the 1st Impression game ending implies). Apparently in the game's end he regains his original memories only to forget what happened up until that point: Sort of like Re-Take in a way. Plus the thought of Shinji thinking Class Rep Hikari likes him when she only has eyes for Touji is pretty funny, too. As an aside, Asuka looks too damn cute in that picture Shin-seiki linked. EDIT: Universalperson is right. I had those 2nd Impression clips in my Favorites on my account, and apparently Youtube deleted those. *sigh*

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Apr 23, 2008 9:53 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shin-seiki, what's the DVD called? Is it this thing http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KIBA-1013 (Looks like it's from both Sega Impression games.), or something else?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 23, 2008 1:38 pm Cool, cool. I'm looking forward to that! Anyway, the reason I at least have no problem with this sort of content being uploaded is because this game is quite rare and hard to find. (Unlike, say, Eva music that you can find with just a bit of searching.) Especially considering the fact it has new Angels, albeit tacky ones and not much information is known without playing the game. Also, the clips from the games are just that, clips, so you actually would have to buy the games to find out more.... /Ass-covering and Fair Use Policy.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Apr 23, 2008 5:37 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: <snip> Also, the clips from the games are just that, clips, so you actually would have to buy the games to find out more.... /Ass-covering and Fair Use Policy.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Apr 24, 2008 9:30 am Well, here goes: Behold Shinji spazzing out in front of the whole class! See Asuka and Hikari tell him what a terrible two-timing rat he is! Gape in amazement as the Three Stooges form the Worst Band Ever! (Hikari, otoh, turns out to be an unexpectedly talented singer...) http://www.megaupload.com/?d=G7N3JQGI

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Thu Apr 24, 2008 6:46 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Well, here goes: Behold Shinji spazzing out in front of the whole class! See Asuka and Hikari tell him what a terrible two-timing rat he is! Gape in amazement as the Three Stooges form the Worst Band Ever! (Hikari, otoh, turns out to be an unexpectedly talented singer...) http://www.megaupload.com/?d=G7N3JQGI

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 24, 2008 9:34 pm Just watched this with Windows Media player and I gotta say...that ruled. Anyway, it's nice that Gainax were able to use their budget more this time around, seeing as the original clips from the game really do reek of EoTV/14ness...Not that that's a bad thing. ~And once again, Rei refers to Asuka as "Asuka". Yay! ~Aww... They removed the "So you don't remember our kiss?" line that Asuka said to Shinji and replaced it with Asuka teasing Shinji about "Hikari-chan" being his "girlfriend"...So that's where he got the idea from. ~Shinji staring blankly as Kensuke and Touji screw around was great. Also, why do they look taller then they should? It's like their heads look bigger than their bodies or something... lawl: Kensuke: "You mean...?" Touji: "...He has amnesia?" Both: "Cool!" Asuka: "Huh?? Just a minute, you two are so..." ~Same as above: Touji and Kensuke pretending to cry because Shinji doesn't remember them: awesome. ~Asuka (also mock-crying/trying to get attention?) that Shinji can't remember their first kiss, hehehe. ~Touji & Kensuke need to be slapped for putting poor Shinji for all that. ~Shinji: "How about Asuka-san to sing a song?" Touji: "No way! We need a girl with a sexy look!" Shinji, blinking: "Se...sexy look?" ~Awesome! I hope that's really Hikari's seiyuu singing. Apparently the song's called "Ai no Evangelion" according to CDJapan... ~Touji and Hikari's interaction: Kawaii! ~Asuka thinking of being a "Cupid of Love" to Shinji and Hikari?! ..........AHHHHHHHHHHHH! WHY Asuka?! HOW COULD YOU?! WHAT ABOUT YOUR BAKA-SHINJI?! IS THIS JUST YOUR FORM OF SCREWING AROUND WITH Shinji AGAIN?! ~Asuka calls Rei "Rei". ~Ritsuko explains Shinji regaining his memories during the point when Asuka & Rei fight in battle. ~I love Touji. ~Nice how it stops before Touji, Hikari and Kensuke tell Shinji how he needs to pilot. (It's a nice touch that he still doesn't want to pilot, memories or not memories.) Funniest parts of the whole thing: ~Shinji acting like a complete ass in front of the class because Touji & Kensuke say he's the "class comedian": ~Asuka pretending to cry/upset about Shinji not remembering her to get Shinji going, and poor Hikari probably falling for it. (either way, she's certainly showing she wants attention from him, in that warped Asuka way. ;) ) One thing that I've never understood which you can briefly hear in this: Don't get me wrong, she impresses me behind belief, but... HOW DOES OGATA SCREAM/YELL LIKE THAT WITHOUT HURTING HER VOICE?!

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Fri Apr 25, 2008 1:44 am If I can do it, she sure-as-hell can!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Apr 25, 2008 9:36 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I hope that's really Hikari's seiyuu singing.

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Fri Apr 25, 2008 11:24 am Shin-seiki wrote: Anyhoo, here's a couple tidbits that weren't in the previous upload. There are several different ways the scene where Shinji meets Hikari behind the gym can play out. Here's the aforementioned "Baby-tachi": http://homepage.mac.com/csf2860/Baby-tachi.wmv

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 25, 2008 6:00 pm According to Reichu, that's not Junko Iwao, it's the same singer as does 'Tamashi no Refrain'.
